creator: bmah@CS.Berkeley.EDU
text:
After some hacking last night, I came up with a version of timidity that

appears to work with both Luigi's new-style audio driver and the
original
VoxWare audio driver.  It addresses Luigi's objections to ports/5607,
and is based on his response to that PR.  However I'm not sure what I
should do, procedurally.  Should I send the one changed source file to
the port maintainer, or the originator of ports/5607 (hi Don!),
or...???...

Thanks muchly...

Bruce.
